[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001111010 5
1 1111111101 9
2 1011101111 8
3 0000111110 5
4 1011111101 8
5 0010101011 5
6 0000010110 3
7 0110100000 3

70 07 0110110110 6

57 75 1011111111 9
